# Orlando Dermatology Center

> Board-certified dermatologists providing medical, cosmetic, and surgical
> dermatology — including Mohs surgery and superficial radiation therapy — across
> four Central Florida locations. Founder: Vitaly Blatnoy, MD, FAAD.
> Group NPI: 1174078281. Accepting new patients.

## Locations
- [Oviedo](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/locations/oviedo): 7560 Red Bug Lake Rd, Suite 1014, Oviedo, FL 32765 — (407) 706-1770
- [Orlando Waterford Lakes](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/locations/orlando-waterford-lakes): 422 South Alafaya Trl, Unit 26, Orlando, FL 32828 — (407) 538-3855
- [Lake Mary](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/locations/lake-mary): 731 Stirling Center Place, Suite 1931, Lake Mary, FL 32746 — (407) 436-7375
- [Casselberry](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/locations/casselberry): 4970 South US Hwy 17-92, Casselberry, FL 32707 — (407) 635-8012

Hours: Mon–Thu 8am–4pm, Fri 8am–2pm. Closed Saturday and Sunday.

## Services
- [Mohs Surgery](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/services/mohs-surgery): Staged skin cancer removal with margin-clear verification and maximum tissue preservation
- [Skin Cancer Surgery](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/services/skin-cancer-surgery): Excision, curettage, and Mohs for all skin cancer types
- [Superficial Radiation Treatment (SRT)](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/services/superficial-radiation-treatment): Non-surgical skin cancer and keloid therapy using SRT-100 technology
- [Skin Cancer Screening](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/services/skin-cancer-screening): Comprehensive full-body skin examinations
- [Adult & Pediatric Dermatology](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/services/adult-pediatric-dermatology): Complete medical dermatology for all ages
- [Mole Check & Removal](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/services/mole-check-removal): Mole mapping, monitoring, and removal
- [Keloid Scars Removal](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/services/keloid-scars-removal): Cryodestruction, surgery, and SRT combination approach
- [Botox & Fillers](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/services/botox-fillers): Injectables and dermal fillers for wrinkles and volume
- [IPL Laser Rejuvenation](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/services/ipl-laser-rejuvenation): Intense pulsed light for sun damage, rosacea, and tone
- [CO2 Laser Resurfacing](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/services/co2-laser-resurfacing): Fractional laser for deep wrinkles and scarring
- [Laser Vein Removal](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/services/laser-vein-removal): Treatment for spider and varicose veins
- [Chemical Peels](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/services/chemical-peels): Professional-grade peels for skin renewal
- [Skin Care](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/services/skin-care): Medical-grade skincare guidance and products
- [Skin Tag Removal](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/services/skin-tag-removal): Quick in-office removal of skin tags
- [Laser Treatments](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/services/laser-treatments): Advanced laser technology for rejuvenation and correction

## Conditions Treated
- [Acne](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/conditions/acne)
- [Eczema](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/conditions/eczema)
- [Psoriasis](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/conditions/psoriasis)
- [Hair Loss](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/conditions/hair-loss)
- [Warts](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/conditions/warts)
- [Aging](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/conditions/aging)
- [Cysts](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/conditions/cysts)
- [Lipoma](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/conditions/lipoma)
- [Hidradenitis Suppurativa](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/conditions/hidradenitis-suppurativa)

## About
- [Providers](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/providers): Board-certified dermatologists, a facial plastic surgeon, APRNs, and PAs
- [New Patients](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/new-patients): What to bring, forms, and portal access
- [Insurance & Financing](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/insurance): Accepted plans and CareCredit
- [Blog](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/blog): Dermatologist-reviewed skin health articles
- [Contact](https://www.orlandodermatologycenter.com/contact)
